# FAQ

[Docs index](README.md)

## Is this a wallet?

No. Public demos are not wallets and do not connect wallets.

## Does it sell AGIALPHA?

No. AGIALPHA is not available from this site or MontrealAI.

## Does it collect data?

No user data wanted; public pages avoid forms, analytics, cookies, and storage requirements.

## Is it an audit?

No. It contains automated checks and review-ready artifacts, not an external audit opinion.

## Is it AGI/ASI?

No achieved AGI or ASI claim is made.

## What does proof-settled mean?

A request is not considered complete until evidence is bundled, validated, and recorded as a governed decision state.

## Why so many demos?

Each demo isolates one institutional proof pattern.

## What should I click first?

Experience Concierge.

## What is an Evidence Docket?

A structured bundle of claims, evidence, boundaries, and receipts.

## What is a governed decision state?

A decision with evidence, validation status, boundary conditions, and rollback/reuse context.
